planets.name: Here
planets.summary: Archive cluster around here: 272 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Here receipt from 2025-04-29
artifacts.excerpt: I've cobbled together syco-bench, a benchmark of model sycophancy. It consists of tests measuring three things: bias towards user in an argument, mirroring user views, and overestimating user IQ. Here are the results, higher scores are worse. See following tweet for caveats: https://t.co/3V5B1qIkC0
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: here, norvid_studies, seems, claude.

artifacts.title: Here receipt from 2026-04-04
artifacts.excerpt: I generated emotion vectors for Gemma 4 E2B using a methodology similar to Anthropic's emotion paper, here is a UMAP plot for layer 25 of Gemma vs Sonnet https://t.co/xV1Z8lI2bA
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: here, norvid_studies, seems, claude.

artifacts.title: Here receipt from 2025-02-22
artifacts.excerpt: I'm pretty skeptical that this matters. Here's a piece on it from the excellent Brian Potter. The lack of a dose-response relationship and minimal effects at very high concentration along with little evidence from chronic exposure in submarines/space makes me doubtful. One reason to discount what I say here though is that I tend to be very skeptical of the health effects of many things.  https://t.co/tOrExgMk2q
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: here, norvid_studies, seems, claude.

artifacts.title: Here receipt from 2025-04-01
artifacts.excerpt: I had Claude pick between all possible pairs of these six tasks, including both orderings for each pair, here's the % each of them was chosen across comparisons. These preferences are transitive, a task with a higher score tied or beat one with a lower total score in all cases. https://t.co/wAAyZIL0jp
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: here, norvid_studies, seems, claude.

artifacts.title: Seems receipt from 2025-03-31

artifacts.title: Seems receipt from 2025-08-17
artifacts.excerpt:
I made an attempt at compiling popular Meta AI characters w/ some scraping and searching. Major themes from and beyond this top list:

-Indian women, seems India is leading the AI gf race
-Astrology, lots w/ Indian themes but not all
-Anime
-Most seem more social than romantic https://t.co/UqomEoQTp6

artifacts.title: Seems receipt from 2025-04-22

This seems right to me, does anyone have a counterargument? https://t.co/mmQP3namFz

artifacts.title: Seems receipt from 2025-08-07

planets.name: Good
planets.summary: Archive cluster around good: 127 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2026-02-10
artifacts.excerpt: A reduction in bad behavior is what I'd expect when improving fare gating, but >90% drop seemed too good to be true, so I looked at the most recent FY26Q1 quarterly report (Jul-Sep 2025), when fare gates were nearly complete. Crime was down 54% YoY. https://t.co/OqD3NHTMdw https://t.co/ZJTpASejtu
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, models, point, most.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2025-02-22
artifacts.excerpt: I got lots of likes for this tweet skeptical of harms from CO2, but on reflection I worry it may give folks the wrong idea. There's a decent case that other factors related to ventilation matter, & CO2 is highly correlated with those, so CO2 may be good proxy for important stuff https://t.co/wU22F3MeZ6
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, models, point, most.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2026-05-24
artifacts.excerpt: In the last year AI progress on math/code has outstripped most other capabilities, giving us models that are more spiky than ever. If this continues we could see savant models that are superintelligent in verifiable domains while still lacking in others. IMO this would be good.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, models, point, most.

Also I teared up 2x during Project Hail Mary.
